## Checklist

- [ ] Ran the project in Godot and verified affected gameplay/UI.
- [ ] If narrative source changed: ran `python3 tools/import_narrative.py` and included updated `data/*` JSON when needed.
- [ ] If adding assets: updated `assets/ATTRIBUTION.md` and confirmed license in `docs/ASSET_LICENSES.md`.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal paths committed.
